title: OWASP Application Security Verification Standard v4.0.3

controls.title: Password Security
controls.text: Verify that user-set passwords are at least 12 characters long, support all Unicode characters, and are checked against a list of known-breached passwords. Verify no password rotation policies that encourage weak passwords.
controls.evidence_expectation: Password policy documentation; login form testing results; breached password check implementation evidence
controls.assessment_procedure: Test minimum length enforcement; attempt common/breached passwords; verify Unicode support; check for max length restrictions that could indicate hashing issues

controls.title: Out-of-Band Verifier
controls.text: Verify that out-of-band authenticators (OTP via email/SMS) expire after a reasonable period, are single-use, not transmitted in plaintext, and that the delivery channel cannot be intercepted.
controls.evidence_expectation: OTP expiry test results; OTP reuse test; OTP channel security analysis
controls.assessment_procedure: Test OTP expiry; attempt OTP reuse; verify OTP not sent in URL; test SIM-swap and email interception mitigations; verify account lockout after failed OTP attempts

controls.title: Session Termination
controls.text: Verify that logout and session expiration invalidate the session token on the server side. Verify that all active sessions are invalidated on password change or account lock.
controls.evidence_expectation: Session invalidation test results; token reuse after logout test; concurrent session management testing
controls.assessment_procedure: Log out and attempt to reuse the session token; change password and verify all sessions terminated; test session fixation; verify idle timeout enforced

controls.title: General Access Control
controls.text: Verify that all application components enforce access controls, that the principle of least privilege is applied, and that access control failures result in safe defaults (deny by default).
controls.evidence_expectation: Access control matrix; privilege escalation test results; forced browse test results
controls.assessment_procedure: Test all protected resources without authentication; test with lower-privilege roles; verify deny-by-default; check for inconsistent enforcement across API and UI layers

controls.title: Operation Level Access Control
controls.text: Verify that sensitive data and APIs are protected against direct object reference attacks, that insecure direct object references (IDOR) are not accessible across account or role boundaries.
controls.evidence_expectation: IDOR/BOLA test cases; cross-account object access attempts; automated IDOR scanning results
controls.assessment_procedure: Map all data objects with user-controlled identifiers; attempt cross-account access; test with manipulated IDs; verify server-side authorisation for every object access

controls.title: Output Encoding and Injection Prevention
controls.text: Verify that output encoding is applied context-sensitively to prevent XSS. Verify that parameterised queries or ORM are used for all database queries. Verify that OS commands use parameterised interfaces.
controls.evidence_expectation: XSS test results; SQLi test results; OS command injection test results; code review snippets showing parameterisation
controls.assessment_procedure: Test all output for XSS in HTML/JS/CSS contexts; test all database inputs for SQL injection; test OS command injection points; verify template injection prevention

controls.title: File Execution
controls.text: Verify that user-submitted file names and paths are validated before use to prevent path traversal, LFI, and RFI. Verify that uploaded files are not executed from attacker-controlled paths.
controls.evidence_expectation: Path traversal test results; file upload security test results; file execution test results
controls.assessment_procedure: Test path traversal in file parameters; test LFI with ../../../etc/passwd variants; test file upload for shell upload; verify upload storage outside web root; test filename sanitisation

controls.title: SSRF Protection
controls.text: Verify that the web or application server is configured to allow only necessary outbound connections, and that URL-accepting user inputs are validated against a strict allowlist to prevent SSRF.
controls.evidence_expectation: SSRF test results; URL validation review; outbound connectivity test; cloud metadata endpoint access attempt
controls.assessment_procedure: Test all URL-accepting inputs with internal IP addresses, cloud metadata endpoints, and localhost; verify DNS rebinding prevention; check allowlist/blocklist implementation; test with bypass techniques (decimal IP, IPv6)

controls.title: RESTful Web Service
controls.text: Verify that RESTful APIs use strong content type enforcement, validate JSON schemas, implement rate limiting, and use appropriate HTTP methods with authorisation checks for each.
controls.evidence_expectation: Content type enforcement test; JSON schema validation results; rate limiting test evidence
controls.assessment_procedure: Test content type manipulation; send malformed JSON; verify rate limits enforced; test HTTP method override; check JSONP is disabled; verify no unnecessary HTTP methods allowed

controls.title: Dependency Security
controls.text: Verify that all components — frameworks, libraries, and third-party packages — are actively maintained, free from known vulnerabilities, and sourced from authenticated repositories.
controls.evidence_expectation: Dependency scan output (OWASP Dependency-Check, Snyk, npm audit); CVE list for identified packages; patching policy
controls.assessment_procedure: Run dependency vulnerability scanner; identify components with known CVEs; verify patch cadence; check for end-of-life components; verify package integrity checks (checksums/SCA)

controls.title: HTTP Security Headers
controls.text: Verify that every HTTP response contains security headers: Content-Security-Policy, X-Content-Type-Options, X-Frame-Options, Cache-Control, and Strict-Transport-Security with appropriate values.
controls.evidence_expectation: Security headers audit for all endpoints; CSP policy review; HSTS max-age verification
controls.assessment_procedure: Check all security headers present and correctly valued; verify CSP blocks unsafe-inline/unsafe-eval; verify HSTS includes subdomains; check Referrer-Policy and Permissions-Policy configured

controls.title: Business Logic
controls.text: Verify that business logic flows require all steps to be completed in order, that values cannot be manipulated (price, quantity, role), and that critical operations implement anti-automation and rate limiting.
controls.evidence_expectation: Workflow step-skipping test cases; price/value manipulation test results; race condition test evidence
controls.assessment_procedure: Map all multi-step workflows; attempt step skipping; manipulate quantity/price fields; test for race conditions in checkout/transfer flows; verify server-side validation of all business-critical values
